merlin_thesis: NAS100 dropped -671pts overnight to 28,977 ahead of CPI report at 08:30 ET. Short-term structure is bearish (-DI 26.7 >> +DI 15.6, ADX 33, price below 5/20-day MAs). Deep discount territory (7.8% of 28,822-30,808 range) with support cluster at 28,822-28,854 (Jun 9/10 lows). Alfred MT5 still offline — no H4/M15 data. CPI is the dominant catalyst: hot print = further downside to 28,500/27,900; soft print = sharp relief rally toward 29,400-29,700. Recommendation: NO_GO — do not position before CPI.
